# aikido_zen_apps (Data Source)

Lists all Zen runtime firewall apps in the Aikido workspace.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "aikido_zen_apps" "all" {}

output "zen_apps" {
  value = [for app in data.aikido_zen_apps.all.apps : "${app.id}: ${app.name} (${app.environment}, blocking=${app.blocking})"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `apps` (Attributes List) The list of Zen apps. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--apps))

<a id="nestedatt--apps"></a>
### Nested Schema for `apps`

Read-Only:

- `blocking` (Boolean) Whether blocking mode is enabled.
- `code_repo_name` (String) The name of the linked code repository.
- `environment` (String) The environment (production, staging, development).
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Zen app.
- `name` (String) The name of the Zen app.
